寒夜翩跹 安息在森林的生灵化作灵蝶，以思念为指引，与迷途的旅人短暂相会。\n1月18日更新后，主题活动【暮冬的溯影】限时开启！感应非凡性感套装【诺特·暮冬烁灵】！\n*套装动作【神蝶召来】可在完成【暮冬烁灵】套装及设计师之影收集后通过【成就】获取。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计灵感揭秘：\n传闻在北地，有片只在闪电夜出现的奇幻森林。\n自由的生灵离去后，会化为蝴蝶在此处安息。\n今夜，是否有人会如传说般，去到那片森林之中？\n从枯木涌起的白雾，迷路的孩子，深藏于心底的回忆……\n记忆重逢，诺特忽然想起，那个从未忘记过的名字。\n灵蝶翩跹而来，轻轻点在他的嘴唇，仿佛诉说着无尽的思念。\n今夜过后，风停雪止，窗外朝阳初升，北地迎来了久违的晴天。\n尘封的大门缓缓开启，不起眼的枯木法杖上再度浮现古老预言，\n“摆脱命运之子，终结宿命之争”。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计亮点：\n忽闪的灵蝶穿越白雾，起舞于梦境与回忆之间。\n黑色的枯木矗立在夜色之中，高悬的提灯散发出静谧的冷光。\n入夜后的迷雾是森林的意志，引导生灵走向平静与安息。\n这是一支由叹息组成的安魂曲。#闪耀暖暖\",\"itemId\":\"7324170854047304960\",\"statisticsInfo\":{\"collectCount\":121,\"diggCount\":3757,\"commentCount\":898},\"appId\":1128,\"secId\":\"Dw+KtzxdxKL616T5MQ14rZZ5xwiEuBf4kH7JgBJbEf0VuS9QAa2BMrYOqcx33KP0ijrzyiEscwTNY+mK\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"longSecId\":\"Ci/KWnAeHBqexlfOnaNlJWGSFpPIKbK3UBHZC2mIMdL+sUnL+PniHOmbqUbV5/sPxxpLCjwGi65Vz1YTC6zntZE/oGo8mHbNFCYdC9xyKR8aH79oRajqVAcVFFFyuLabIxTPOPrQsly1ouUsEkjtUhEQrvzGDRj1vIa1CSABIgEDcw5L9w==\"},\"hideTxt\":\"未上架\",\"subTitle\":\"新年新气象，龙年行大运\",\"title\":\"暖暖祝你新春喜气洋洋\",\"cardType\":\"video\",\"showTitle\":true,\"moduleType\":2,\"uniqueId\":\"7324956075113840678\",\"bgImg\":[{\"showRetry\":true,\"showReplace\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\",\"size\":\"6.6kb\",\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"status\":\"success\",\"showPicInfo\":true,\"url\":\"https://p9-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/cd309b15c7fe4d76a93106ef4fee4584~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.5478883104461616\"}],\"tabKey\":\"tab208\",\"cardTag\":\"精彩内容\",\"id\":\"c9d8a79bfa6aa7b1851ee571551e6c68\"},{\"bgImg\":[{\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"showReplace\":true,\"showPicInfo\":true,\"status\":\"success\",\"size\":\"9.5kb\",\"url\":\"https://p3-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/f022f5353e127be84aabb98ef2789f8b~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.4879801844089753\",\"showRetry\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\"}],\"title\":\"崩坏3神秘嘉宾惊喜拜年\",\"moduleType\":2,\"prefectureName\":\"崩坏3\",\"videoIdObj\":{\"longSecId\":\"Ci970c1GJI/XZlRPLee8hHqoHpRAxJCsq+ut2EPS3QVqBvNrkUeeprqrZxwgM1D6eRpLCjz7PW4I5sHODtjOBed0+akprUgQCZshSPkom6m2cLv+D8/Z81wfL+UMe3nwpjLwiaLFyLKQyM2Kz6dV/wcQwojHDRj1vIa1CSABIgED8czK7g==\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"appId\":1128,\"videoInfo\":{\"bigCoverUrl\":\"https://p26-sign.douyinpic.com/tos-cn-p-0015/oo3TdyCDjR7wBQkQ "cubic_fc3ba_config_resource_9":"{\"titleLogo\":\"https://sf1-cdn-tos.douyinstatic.com/obj/magic-cn/cubic/pure_png/title_new.png\",\"__version\":1}","cubic_olympic_ab":0,"cyber_0f91a_0802_setting":"{\"guideSchema\":\"https://www.bytedance.net/\",\"waitSec\":23,\"__version\":3}","cyber_act_yyh_ab":3,"cyber_act_yyh_effect_ab":0,"cyber_act_yyh_enable_scroll_monitor":0,"cyber_banner_switch":"prod","daily_rank_perf_config":{"enableSkeleton":true,"enableStraigtOut":true},"deco_text_modify_frequency":5,"disable_feed_mix_live_router_check":1,"disable_game_lottery":0,"doodle_max_count":140,"doodle_min_count":10,"ec_channel_check_login":0,"ecom_aftersale_aftersale_auto_next":0,"ecom_aftersale_big_font":0,"ecom_aftersale_instant_retail":0,"ecom_aftersale_returnbook_split":0,"ecom_aftersale_review":"0","ecom_comment_rank_style":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt1":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt2":0,"ecom_comment_upload":0,"ecom_fast_refund_colorless":0,"ecom_live_product_rank_ruler":[{"content":"- 抖音电商直播间带货榜是根据真实数据进行排名的直播间排行榜，希望帮助消费者通过榜单找到正在直播的好商品，让选择更简单。直播间排名越靠前曝光机会越大。","title":"直播间带货榜"},{"content":"- 直播间带货榜当前分为总榜、抖音旗舰榜、特色主题榜、国家补贴榜、商品类目榜，榜单形态持续更新中：\n- 总榜：按照上榜规则对全部电商直播间进行排序展示\n- 抖音旗舰榜：聚合抖音旗舰店铺热销直播间进行排序展示\n- 特色主题榜：由抖音电商运营就特色主题或活动，按照特定规则对直播间进行圈选后排序展示\n- 国家补贴榜：聚合正在直播国家补贴商品的直播间进行排序展示\n- 商品类目榜：按照直播间在播商品所属类目对相关直播间进行排序后展示","title":"榜单介绍"},{"content":"- 上榜直播间均为正在直播的直播间\n- 上榜作者基础要求：近30天无虚假交易处罚记录，近14天退单率无异常、无严重违规记录\n- 排序规则：以该直播间所售卖商品的【带货力、互动力、吸引力】进行综合排名，每小时结算","title":"上榜规则"},{"content":"- 带货力：根据单位时间内的交易额、交易量等数据指标综合评估直播间主播的带货能力\n- 互动力：根据单位时间内的直播间观看时长、分享率、评论率等数据指标综合评估直播间的互动氛围\n- 吸引力：根据单位时间内购买商品的新用户数、新增粉丝数等数据指标综合评估直播间对平台用户的吸引力","title":"指标解读"},{"content":"- 为保证榜单时效性，榜单每小时进行动态更新。由于技术等原因，榜单更新时间偶有延迟，具体更新时间以实际情况为准。\n- 直播间榜单会露出商品名称和商品标签。所有的上榜直播间都会展示一款商品，并露出对应的商品名称。同时，结合商品名称的露出，会露出唯一的商品标签，该标签由算法选取商品详情页的商品已有标签作为候选，不同的用户看到的标签不尽相同。整体上，商品标签的露出是为了给用户提供更多的决策理由，帮助更快的找到合适的直播间/商品。\n- 榜单排名旁的说明属于热度值标签，用于鼓励榜单中前3名的直播间和整体数据表现较好的直播间。热度标签只有三种，分别为：蝉联榜首、持续霸榜、排名飙升。每个直播间最多展示一种标签，若同一直播间同时获得多种热度标签，则按算法筛选展示唯一标签。\n- 平台将实时监控上榜直播间的数据表现，若发现直播间有刷单、互动异常、售卖假冒盗版商品等违规作弊行为，将立即对违规直播间进行下榜。低质作者、近期有虚假交易判罚、假货山寨判罚、直播间有处罚消息的作者均会有一定的上榜限制，请务必诚信经营、用心直播。","title":"补充说明"}],"ecom_live_scene_id_allow_list":["1001","1003","1031","1098","1099","1046","1091","1092","1093","1095","1082","1086","1087"],"ecom_logistics_map_late":0,"ecom_share_desc_type":0,"ecom_toolbar_ab":1,"effect_download_opt":true,"enable_anchor_gift":1,"enable_annie_live_transition_from_vc_fix":1,"enable_audio_draw_opt":false,"enable_broadcast_high_profile":1,"enable_feed_mix_live_router_check_arr":["search_result","general_search"],"enable_gift_extra_flex_model":false,"enable_gift_mp4_after_change_room":1,"enable_giftvideoview_render_appstate":0,"enable_live_thirhas_prop_bundled_party":false,"enable_new_guest_list_rule":true,"enable_preview_room_in_mobile_network":1,"enable_public_screen_layout_service":false,"enable_space_opt":false,"enable_switch_landscape":1,"enable_upstream_log":1,"enable_vip_recommend":true,"ent_bill_retain_popup":0,"entry":{"wallet_home":"sslocal://webcast_wallet"},"faction_competition_cross_room_rules":[{"desc":"榜单按照加入粉丝团、新增粉丝、送礼等互动行为综合排序，榜单值越高排名越靠前。","title":"排名规则"},{"desc":"榜单开启期间，观众每送出10钻石礼物、5名观众首次加入粉丝团或新增5个粉丝，均有机会为本直播间正在表演成员贡献1点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新加粉丝团获得1000点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新增粉丝获得1000点榜单值。","title":"计值规则"},{"desc":"本次活动由机构自行举办，与抖音平台无关。直播过程中有可能出现网络波动等极端情况导致数值存在一定误差的情况。","title":"其他"}],"faction_competition_region_rank_rules":[{"desc":"1）团员排名：自然日内累计榜单值，按赛道分别进行榜单排名，榜单数值每日24点清零，次日重新开始累计，达到当日晋级名次的主播成功进入下一轮。\n2）计值规则：1榜单值=10音浪=5新加团=5新增关注人数，每天最多通过加团获得1000榜单值，每天最多通过新增关注获得1000榜单值","title":"团员排名规则"},{"desc":"团榜单值=该团常驻团员榜单值加和，常驻团员将按照近期团员上场次数、送礼等数据综合判定，无法自主修改。","title":"团排名规则"},{"desc":"厂牌榜单值由旗下团员当日榜单值与榜单排名结果综合计算得出。每日比赛结束后（24:00）更新当日积分及排名结果。\n1）团员当日榜单值：当日超过1000荣誉值（+2分）；当日超过5000荣誉值（+5分）。若当日荣誉值超过5000，仅按+5分计，不与1000档叠加计算。单人单日最高得分为5分。\n2）团员榜单排名：每日比赛结束后，按厂牌团员排名计算得分，厂牌将获得其所有入榜团员的排名分之和。 #古生物","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"怪诞虫是一种生活在5亿年前寒武纪的生物，其化石研究历经半个世纪，曾被画反、前后搞错。最终，科学家发现怪诞虫的眼睛与人类相似，其背上的硬刺是防御武器。怪诞虫是地球上超过80%动物物种的远祖，其生存策略和眼睛结构对研究生物进化具有重要意义。","chapter_data":{"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"怪诞虫研究历经半个世纪，曾被画反，后发现其眼睛与人类相似。","timestamp":2000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/fc60a7202b3b4aa8a70fceacc526ebdf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=%2F%2Bs1TrjvbpoA4zCkXmL7NBFA8%2FU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"怪诞虫的发现与研究","detail":"怪诞虫化石被发现，康威·莫里斯复原图错误，侯先光和拉姆斯科德发现真相，马丁·史密斯团队最终确认头的位置。","timestamp":57000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/de3d2b50ce124ac0ace3ab5ccc99a435?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=nj5Ndyn3PcZ3YiwrBPvHLpN5YKA%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"怪诞虫的生存策略","detail":"怪诞虫靠背上硬刺防御，类似刺猬、豪猪和海胆。","timestamp":236000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/2903e0d1fe8d4d40b1c94c5c5cb9bf07?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=x3TVHES8Rhd95VBZmc4DoLrQJNQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"进化关系","detail":"怪诞虫是地球上超过80%动物物种的远祖，其眼睛结构与人类相似。","timestamp":281000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/359d254b09f2490f8dce8297c9cba2e4?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=MnTOWD7INinb3VythnSFOhc7VMw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"怪诞虫研究揭示科学需承认错误，其眼睛一直在看着我们。","timestamp":433000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/272d0255419b4c4f8b8c824f98340e9e?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=zUthbDYX9Z7NRdtD09PN0Li9IfU%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7611921610508864818,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"component_control":{"data_source_url" #古生物","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"怪诞虫是一种生活在5亿年前寒武纪的生物，其化石研究历经半个世纪，曾被画反、前后搞错。最终，科学家发现怪诞虫的眼睛与人类相似，其背上的硬刺是防御武器。怪诞虫是地球上超过80%动物物种的远祖，其生存策略和眼睛结构对研究生物进化具有重要意义。","chapter_data":{"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"怪诞虫研究历经半个世纪，曾被画反，后发现其眼睛与人类相似。","timestamp":2000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/fc60a7202b3b4aa8a70fceacc526ebdf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=%2F%2Bs1TrjvbpoA4zCkXmL7NBFA8%2FU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"怪诞虫的发现与研究","detail":"怪诞虫化石被发现，康威·莫里斯复原图错误，侯先光和拉姆斯科德发现真相，马丁·史密斯团队最终确认头的位置。","timestamp":57000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/de3d2b50ce124ac0ace3ab5ccc99a435?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=3o7phnXJ8jM8zr%2FGYDUd9iVVTAs%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"怪诞虫的生存策略","detail":"怪诞虫靠背上硬刺防御，类似刺猬、豪猪和海胆。","timestamp":236000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/2903e0d1fe8d4d40b1c94c5c5cb9bf07?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=w5GUZX2z13Caq88OJVYkeeROwX4%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"进化关系","detail":"怪诞虫是地球上超过80%动物物种的远祖，其眼睛结构与人类相似。","timestamp":281000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/359d254b09f2490f8dce8297c9cba2e4?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=MnTOWD7INinb3VythnSFOhc7VMw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"怪诞虫研究揭示科学需承认错误，其眼睛一直在看着我们。","timestamp":433000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/272d0255419b4c4f8b8c824f98340e9e?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=zUthbDYX9Z7NRdtD09PN0Li9IfU%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7611921610508864818,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"component_control":{"data_source_ur "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"怪诞虫是一种生活在5亿年前寒武纪的生物，其化石研究历经半个世纪，曾被画反、前后搞错。最终，科学家发现怪诞虫的眼睛与人类相似，其背上的硬刺是防御武器。怪诞虫是地球上超过80%动物物种的远祖，其生存策略和眼睛结构对研究生物进化具有重要意义。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"怪诞虫研究历经半个世纪，曾被画反，后发现其眼睛与人类相似。","points":null,"timestamp":2000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/fc60a7202b3b4aa8a70fceacc526ebdf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=%2F%2Bs1TrjvbpoA4zCkXmL7NBFA8%2FU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"怪诞虫的发现与研究","detail":"怪诞虫化石被发现，康威·莫里斯复原图错误，侯先光和拉姆斯科德发现真相，马丁·史密斯团队最终确认头的位置。","points":null,"timestamp":57000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/de3d2b50ce124ac0ace3ab5ccc99a435?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=3o7phnXJ8jM8zr%2FGYDUd9iVVTAs%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"怪诞虫的生存策略","detail":"怪诞虫靠背上硬刺防御，类似刺猬、豪猪和海胆。","points":null,"timestamp":236000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/2903e0d1fe8d4d40b1c94c5c5cb9bf07?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=x3TVHES8Rhd95VBZmc4DoLrQJNQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"进化关系","detail":"怪诞虫是地球上超过80%动物物种的远祖，其眼睛结构与人类相似。","points":null,"timestamp":281000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/359d254b09f2490f8dce8297c9cba2e4?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=MnTOWD7INinb3VythnSFOhc7VMw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"怪诞虫研究揭示科学需承认错误，其眼睛一直在看着我们。","points":null,"timestamp":433000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/272d0255419b4c4f8b8c824f98340e9e?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=zUthbDYX9Z7NRdtD09PN0Li9IfU%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7611921610508864818,"comment_list":null,"comment_per "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"vertical_type":1,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"霸王龙的真实叫声是次声波，能让人的内脏震动。它们的眼眶呈锁孔形，具有强大的咬合力。霸王龙可能是温血动物，具有大脑运转速度快、可能协同狩猎等特点。它们并非无敌，会被猎物反杀，也会被同类吞噬。在6600万年前的陨石撞击后，霸王龙灭绝。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6ce84b1e24e9469c8e94fb6fb5829192?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=bzKK5p5bnXTz2dpUpQIeh4g9AT8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"次声波","detail":"霸王龙发出次声波，频率低于人耳下限，身体会感觉到莫名的恐惧。","points":null,"timestamp":10000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/86050ff7c698469f94cfcd1f9fa0b54b?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=C3pHpK76UH3j4jYiJAxgHl16U4M%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"锁孔形眼眶","detail":"霸王龙眼眶呈锁孔形，能在咬合瞬间分散冲击力，降低颅骨骨折风险。","points":null,"timestamp":53000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/7c265ffb1d0345f4b27be9f8d979c1a0?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=k%2FDBD7nhEHkfZz6W77zSjCyg%2By8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"嘴唇","detail":"霸王龙有嘴唇，闭嘴时表情平静，没有任何多余的表达。","points":null,"timestamp":114000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/5953d69af2834f1e93fc05bf3fb5fc39?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=XU1tvENJx%2FkCXNsaI4Sf6SX1yP0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"温血动物","detail":"霸王龙是温血动物，大脑运转速度快，可能协同狩猎。","points":null,"timestamp":161000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/fc6011004deb47fbbdcf3ba250dcb2cd?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=9V4EBSXUWQhnjFJ%2Fz2W8O6zS%2FkU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"协同狩猎","detail":"霸王龙可能像狼群一样协同狩猎，是有组织、有分工的猎杀集团。","points":null,"timestamp":194000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8926d4c436fe49d6a997119e0f60c839? 细菌功能：从热液喷口毒水中捕捉铁离子，转化为硫化铁后沉积到蜗牛身上，过程类似生物电镀。\n2. 鳞片附着：腹足铁鳞片上附着不同细菌群落，如同微型化工厂持续工作。","type":1},{"desc":"・三层复合铁甲防护超强","detail":"1. 外层硬壳：30微米厚硫化铁壳，抵御第一波冲击力。\n2. 中层缓冲：柔性有机蛋白质层，分散冲击波。\n3. 内层防线：传统碳酸钙硬壳，三层总厚不足1毫米。","type":1},{"desc":"・兼具物理与化学双重防御","detail":"1. 物理防御：铁甲坚硬，螃蟹钳子夹击会先碎裂。\n2. 化学防御：硫化铁含毒素，天敌咬食会崩牙且中毒。","type":1},{"desc":"・唯一带磁性的地球动物","detail":"1. 磁性表现：可被磁铁吸附，如同冰箱贴。\n2. 外号由来：被科学家称为“海底穿山甲”。","type":1}],"timestamp":75000},{"desc":"基因与进化","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・进化靠激活古老基因程序","detail":"1. 基因共性：控制铁甲生长的基因，章鱼、珍珠贝、普通蜗牛均具备。\n2. 沉睡时长：该基因程序在软体动物体内存在5亿年未被激活。\n3. 激活条件：在400℃毒水环境中唤醒古老基因。\n4. 进化本质：并非创造新功能，而是激活原有沉睡程序。","type":1}],"timestamp":165000},{"desc":"繁殖与共生关系","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・与细菌深度共生存活","detail":"1. 能量来源：食道腺体寄生1.2亿个细菌，分解硫化氢产生能量供其使用。\n2. 生理适配：心脏占体重4%（人类仅0.3%），持续泵血供给细菌。\n3. 繁殖特性：雌雄同体，可独自繁殖、存活，在极端环境中自成孤岛。","type":1}],"timestamp":203000},{"desc":"生存挑战与保护现状","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・因深海采矿濒临灭绝","detail":"1. 栖息地局限：仅分布于印度洋3个热液喷口，总面积不足0.02平方公里。\n2. 威胁核心：栖息地位于深海采矿目标区，沉积物会活埋种群。\n3. "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"史前铲齿象的下颌骨像铲子，用于铲草，它们的牙齿磨损方向与现代象相反。这种独特的结构使它们在草原上具有高效的进食能力。然而，雄性铲齿象的铲子逐渐演变成炫耀和争夺配偶的武器，导致物种在环境变化时无法适应。铲齿象的灭绝提醒我们不要过于单一，要保留退路，以应对不断变化的世界。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"铲齿象的特征","detail":"铲齿象下颌骨像铲子，牙齿并排长在前端，脖子几乎锁死，一生低头，牙齿磨损方向与现代象相反。","points":null,"timestamp":3000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8fddcb39922444dea8793fbe27fec738?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=UnADlMPcYinwv5zZOs9NCo53TyE%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"百年争论","detail":"铲齿象的样子争论了一百年，各种理论出现，直到2019年中国科学院的研究终结争论。","points":null,"timestamp":63000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c20b4bfad0704f3eb291d886eb729b64?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=f%2BtTS%2F4H%2BiIttPqjnG%2BHEEi35S8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"进食方式","detail":"铲齿象用长鼻子卷住草茎，用铲子水平横切，效率是其他同时期大象的两到三倍。","points":null,"timestamp":116000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/91608c1f1251406fae8c1714d7c26f10?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=U%2BHATkQ2KW226PLIHpiCBL1yulk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"黄金时代","detail":"铲齿象在黄金时代足迹遍布四大洲，分化出至少十五个物种，在中国甘肃临夏盆地有化石群。","points":null,"timestamp":179000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6c5453344f2e4d08a983ee477dc78b5a?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=mLroZGEv5wo7IBEIAS1ABBs%2F3L8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"灭绝原因","detail":"雄性铲齿象的铲子是炫耀和争夺配偶的武器，导致铲子越来越大，最终在环境变化中无法适应。","points":null,"timestamp":241500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/bd06289b246247b7ba5ac6627c413a35?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=xwEfQv1H3%2F2T5WLL4ICPjoVmnA0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"教训","detail":"铲齿象的灭绝教训是不要过于单一，要保留退路，最能活下去的是最懂得保留退路的那个。","points":n "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"vertical_type":1,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"阿根廷龙是地球上最大的陆生动物，体重100吨，体长35米。它的骨骼结构、腿部结构、心脏、呼吸、消化系统和防御能力都非常独特，适应了当时的环境。然而，由于繁殖缓慢，无法适应环境变化，最终在6600万年前灭绝。阿根廷龙展示了进化的多样性和适应性。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/3b85fbae019c44888ed053bb42bc562f?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=%2FLzkUf%2B6uuVRGndBWDoiPjbHxP0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"阿根廷龙的体型","detail":"阿根廷龙是地球历史上最大的陆生动物，体型巨大，体重100吨，脖子长，统治地球1000万年。","points":null,"timestamp":6000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ef40ded5b3ac45f08c1ddc7b23940b35?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=RTGOTvu4wveOHjQQLz%2FAuSIGRfw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"骨骼结构","detail":"阿根廷龙骨骼内部布满蜂窝状支撑小梁，像现代航母船体结构，既省重量又硬。","points":null,"timestamp":65000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c19c42df3a59416e9f94ede2d81ab1f1?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=E8Ro%2BnKVbW3Bj9y587NCnpxaCSI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"腿部结构","detail":"阿根廷龙腿部骨骼内部充满可调节体液的软骨腔，体液像液压泵一样分散冲击力。","points":null,"timestamp":92000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ea7d00a882354d169290552fa210f7b6?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=w31QqZ2ezaghgJCvvv8XhWJXAG4%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"心脏与呼吸","detail":"阿根廷龙心脏可能超过400KG，像工业级液压泵，呼吸可能类似鸟类气囊系统。","points":null,"timestamp":128000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/3de102a504ab484682b9b897e7a75806?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=Uirz8stGdmefmuITX5ATlfja44c%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"消化系统","detail":"阿根廷龙消化系统高效，牙齿像小剪刀，胃里有特殊菌群和石子，肠道内壁有绒毛。","points":null,"timestamp":186000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/15cbdea002c948289cf5ca3db01fd3d5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=t07Q%2FoHAzlhJGrfl11lsAtCvhbU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"防御能力","detail":"阿根廷龙防御能力强，皮肤厚，尾巴冲击力高达20吨。","points":null,"timestamp":228000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/b7c93aafabaf48deb9e4d568e87312cf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=I%2BMJuF2GTsMJZgxfW6rW59C5mTg%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"繁殖与灭绝","detail":"阿根廷龙繁殖缓慢，环境变化和小行星撞击导致其灭绝。","points":null,"timestamp":270000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/72e3b602245541e2bb251a146b4b8ad0?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=jUoon6fhcLaHw23IG1SVRkvpMcI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"阿根廷龙是时代的完美答案，但时代变了，答案也会过期。","points":null,"timestamp":304000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/099f58c2d2fc44578d8aac1565302791?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=P7aRXOO35YaQzl%2FKuBHHXDUXlSs%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7613782375826263305,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"component_control":{"data_source_url":"/aweme/v1/web/mix/aweme/"},"component_info_v2":"{\"desc_lines_limit\":0,\"hide_marquee\":false}","cover_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1772721864,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":97,"enable_danmaku":true,"first_danmaku_offset":912,"is_post_denied":false,"last_danmaku_offset":309554,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"史前最大的素食恐龙之，体长35米，体重100吨一——阿根廷龙 "},"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"地球上第一个掠食者奇虾，生活在5亿年前，拥有超过16000个感光单元的眼睛和旋转的螺旋锯片嘴。它统治寒武纪海洋长达1.2亿年，但在泥盆纪海洋环境变化后逐渐灭绝。奇虾的后代包括龙虾、螳螂虾和蟹等节肢动物，它们选择了更灵活的身体配置，适应了环境的变化。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"5亿年前，地球历史上第一个真正的杀手奇虾出现，它的眼睛拥有超过1600个感光单元，嘴是一个旋转的螺旋锯片，用两根巨型触手抓住猎物，整个海洋没有任何生物能逃脱它。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/dfa5c3b5246a4194ab46868be342ae27?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=wYFf7ngN4fvMfCYbyBz5VwINZ4U%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"奇虾的发现与命名","detail":"奇虾化石的发现和研究经历了漫长的过程，最初被误认为是虾尾巴和水母，直到1985年才被完整拼出。","points":null,"timestamp":54000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/44efe0f778c74673b8e7978c744c7c86?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=xyToGTsbziUan5nCS5t39VE5%2Bv0%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"奇虾的真实样貌","detail":"奇虾身体流线型，两侧有11对游泳叶片，前附肢像捕兽夹，嘴是旋转的口锥，眼睛拥有超过16000个独立感光单元。","points":null,"timestamp":139000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/b570a57d0ee34aa39e12cc868f8b5e25?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=qx6Bjf61Uo8QTmtKfUwXrzwPtuY%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"奇虾的进化","detail":"奇虾家族多样，有的专精撕裂，有的专精过滤，有的甚至演化出了在海底爬行的腿。","points":null,"timestamp":373000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ee06a134a597472db794fc93b9b73ecd?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=op35qOKB07D5qE8kJ7X6vazodiw%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"奇虾的灭绝","detail":"奇虾演化速度突然停止，无法适应环境变化，最终在泥盆纪海洋中消失。","points":null,"timestamp":435000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/17568b6264a6401d963d2273369fb226?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=Anec7iguIK1xXuvySh92%2FuLWOx4%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"奇虾的后代","detail":"奇虾的后代包括龙虾、螳螂虾、蟹等节肢动物，它们选择了更灵活更平衡的身体配置，活到了今天。","points":null,"timestamp":536000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/53d00f729615447 "},"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"古网生物是一种存在于海底五亿年的神秘生物，其化石记录显示其存在于寒武纪早期。1976年，科学家在大西洋海底发现了类似的六边形洞，后在其他海域也有发现。古网生物的管道由生物分泌，非身体部分，其主人身份仍然成谜。古网生物喜欢沉积速度极慢的海底，化石保存在浊流岩中。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"1976年科学家在大西洋海底发现奇怪的六边形洞，类似达芬奇画作，化石记录显示其存在5亿年，DNA检测为空。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/537df85baaf44cccae1e66dd0552efc2?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=wd79zf8Fh2fKhJhq6f%2FhkkmgzS0%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"发现与研究","detail":"1850年意大利科学家发现化石，1976年美国科学家在大西洋中脊深海发现类似物，管道为生物分泌，非身体。","points":null,"timestamp":31500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ae0a179990a7448e90757bdcb03d4fc2?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=rb9NKWdd5Umt02YWGg5v4Fls%2B7M%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"假设与推翻","detail":"科学家提出蠕虫、玻璃海绵、异足虫等假设，但均被推翻，DNA检测结果令人困惑。","points":null,"timestamp":110000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c3ec40ac8db24a2e97b6a6bdd5dfeb2b?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=mKl5JiSk9mAzcx93ArTUecnCA6I%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"分布与环境","detail":"古网迹分布全球，喜欢沉积速度极慢的海底，化石保存在浊流岩中。","points":null,"timestamp":233000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/9a8cf00913764c69a1cca9fde7043b9d?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=MYZVnPowKLHuRn51iOWRAj5Sjmc%3D&from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"古网迹是地球上保存时间最长的生命痕迹之一，见证了地球的变迁。","points":null,"timestamp":272000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/7f83e31ff8db45bb97a7e8d2be169878?lk3s=138a59ce&x-expires=1776794400&x-signature=5KB9AZ1qOBuBCSiIGQEKd%2FFHW0M%3D&from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_d #蜗牛","preview_video_status":1,"product_genre_info":{"material_genre_sub_type_set":[4],"product_genre_type":2,"special_info":{"recommend_group_name":0}},"promotions":[],"publish_plus_alienation":{"alienation_type":0},"rate":12,"recommend_chapter_info":{"chapter_abstract":"鳞角腹足蜗牛是一种生活在深海的独特生物，其身体由铁组成，具有强大的防护能力。它们与细菌共生，利用细菌产生的能量生存。这种蜗牛的铁甲是由细菌帮助形成的，具有物理和化学防御。然而，由于深海采矿的威胁，它们的生存面临挑战，已被列为濒危物种。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_recommend_source":2,"chapter_recommend_type":1,"push_scene":[],"recommend_chapter_list":[{"desc":"独特的生存环境","detail":"","points":[],"timestamp":4000},{"desc":"铁甲的形成与特性","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・铁甲由细菌协同打造","detail":"1. 细菌功能：从热液喷口毒水中捕捉铁离子，转化为硫化铁后沉积到蜗牛身上，过程类似生物电镀。\n2. 鳞片附着：腹足铁鳞片上附着不同细菌群落，如同微型化工厂持续工作。","type":1},{"desc":"・三层复合铁甲防护超强","detail":"1. 外层硬壳：30微米厚硫化铁壳，抵御第一波冲击力。\n2. 中层缓冲：柔性有机蛋白质层，分散冲击波。\n3. 内层防线：传统碳酸钙硬壳，三层总厚不足1毫米。","type":1},{"desc":"・兼具物理与化学双重防御","detail":"1. 物理防御：铁甲坚硬，螃蟹钳子夹击会先碎裂。\n2. 化学防御：硫化铁含毒素，天敌咬食会崩牙且中毒。","type":1},{"desc":"・唯一带磁性的地球动物","detail":"1. 磁性表现：可被磁铁吸附，如同冰箱贴。\n2. 外号由来：被科学家称为“海底穿山甲”。","type":1}],"timestamp":75000},{"desc":"基因与进化","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・进化靠激活古老基因程序","detail":"1. 基因共性：控制铁甲生长的基因，章鱼、珍珠贝、普通蜗牛均具备。\n2. 沉睡时长：该基因程序在软体动物体内存在5亿年未被激活。\n3. 激活条件：在400℃毒水环境中唤醒古老基因。\n4. 进化本质：并非创造新功能，而是激活原有沉睡程序。","type":1}],"timestamp":165000},{"desc":"繁殖与共生关系","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・与细菌深度共生存活","detail":"1. 能量来源：食道腺体寄生1.2亿个细菌，分解硫化氢产生能量供其使用。\n2. 生理适配：心脏占体重4%（人类仅0.3%），持续泵血供给细菌。\n3. 繁殖特性：雌雄同体，可独自繁殖、存活，在极端环境中自成孤岛。","type":1}],"timestamp":203000},{"desc":"生存挑战与保护现状","detail":"","points":[{"desc":"・因深海采矿濒临灭绝","detail":"1. 栖息地局限：仅分布于印度洋3个热液喷口，总面积不足0.02平方公里。\n2. 威胁核心：栖息地位于深海采矿目标区，沉积物会活埋种群。\n3. 保护等级：2019年被IUCN列入濒危红色名录，是首个因采矿濒危的物种。","type":1}],"timestamp":280000},{"desc":"结语","detail":"","points":[],"timestamp":360000}]},"ref_tts_id_list":null,"ref_voice_modify_id_list":null,"region":"","relation_labels":null,"reply_smart_emojis":null,"risk_infos":{"content":"","risk_sink":false,"type":0,"vote":false,"warn":false},"sec_item_id":"MS4wLjAAAAAAMBKSKrnmNbo4RSnUEvZ0GoH181S79EgSK92r8t6oQNjK1q3oCUkirUZggET4_mSA","select_anchor_expanded_content":0,"seo_info":{},"series_basic_info":{},"series_paid_info":{"item_price":0,"series_paid_status":0},"share_info":{"share_link_desc":"8.92 "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"史前铲齿象的下颌骨像铲子，用于铲草，它们的牙齿磨损方向与现代象相反。这种独特的结构使它们在草原上具有高效的进食能力。然而，雄性铲齿象的铲子逐渐演变成炫耀和争夺配偶的武器，导致物种在环境变化时无法适应。铲齿象的灭绝提醒我们不要过于单一，要保留退路，以应对不断变化的世界。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"铲齿象的特征","detail":"铲齿象下颌骨像铲子，牙齿并排长在前端，脖子几乎锁死，一生低头，牙齿磨损方向与现代象相反。","points":null,"timestamp":3000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8fddcb39922444dea8793fbe27fec738?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=UnADlMPcYinwv5zZOs9NCo53TyE%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"百年争论","detail":"铲齿象的样子争论了一百年，各种理论出现，直到2019年中国科学院的研究终结争论。","points":null,"timestamp":63000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c20b4bfad0704f3eb291d886eb729b64?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=f%2BtTS%2F4H%2BiIttPqjnG%2BHEEi35S8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"进食方式","detail":"铲齿象用长鼻子卷住草茎，用铲子水平横切，效率是其他同时期大象的两到三倍。","points":null,"timestamp":116000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/91608c1f1251406fae8c1714d7c26f10?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=U%2BHATkQ2KW226PLIHpiCBL1yulk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"黄金时代","detail":"铲齿象在黄金时代足迹遍布四大洲，分化出至少十五个物种，在中国甘肃临夏盆地有化石群。","points":null,"timestamp":179000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6c5453344f2e4d08a983ee477dc78b5a?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=mLroZGEv5wo7IBEIAS1ABBs%2F3L8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"灭绝原因","detail":"雄性铲齿象的铲子是炫耀和争夺配偶的武器，导致铲子越来越大，最终在环境变化中无法适应。","points":null,"timestamp":241500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/bd06289b246247b7ba5ac6627c413a35?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=xwEfQv1H3%2F2T5WLL4ICPjoVmnA0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"教训","detail":"铲齿象的灭绝教训是不要过于单一，要保留退路，最能活下去的是最懂得保留退路的那个。","points":n "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"vertical_type":1,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"阿根廷龙是地球上最大的陆生动物，体重100吨，体长35米。它的骨骼结构、腿部结构、心脏、呼吸、消化系统和防御能力都非常独特，适应了当时的环境。然而，由于繁殖缓慢，无法适应环境变化，最终在6600万年前灭绝。阿根廷龙展示了进化的多样性和适应性。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/3b85fbae019c44888ed053bb42bc562f?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=iKhMW7dQYtLwfSiPAqBOfI0fb4s%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"阿根廷龙的体型","detail":"阿根廷龙是地球历史上最大的陆生动物，体型巨大，体重100吨，脖子长，统治地球1000万年。","points":null,"timestamp":6000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ef40ded5b3ac45f08c1ddc7b23940b35?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=RTGOTvu4wveOHjQQLz%2FAuSIGRfw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"骨骼结构","detail":"阿根廷龙骨骼内部布满蜂窝状支撑小梁，像现代航母船体结构，既省重量又硬。","points":null,"timestamp":65000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c19c42df3a59416e9f94ede2d81ab1f1?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=E8Ro%2BnKVbW3Bj9y587NCnpxaCSI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"腿部结构","detail":"阿根廷龙腿部骨骼内部充满可调节体液的软骨腔，体液像液压泵一样分散冲击力。","points":null,"timestamp":92000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ea7d00a882354d169290552fa210f7b6?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=w31QqZ2ezaghgJCvvv8XhWJXAG4%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"心脏与呼吸","detail":"阿根廷龙心脏可能超过400KG，像工业级液压泵，呼吸可能类似鸟类气囊系统。","points":null,"timestamp":128000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/3de102a504ab484682b9b897e7a75806?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=Uirz8stGdmefmuITX5ATlfja44c%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"消化系统","detail":"阿根廷龙消化系统高效，牙齿像小剪刀，胃里有特殊菌群和石子，肠道内壁有绒毛。","points":null,"timestamp":186000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/15cbdea002c948289cf5ca3db01fd3d5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=t07Q%2FoHAzlhJGrfl11lsAtCvhbU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"防御能力","detail":"阿根廷龙防御能力强，皮肤厚，尾巴冲击力高达20吨。","points":null,"timestamp":228000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/b7c93aafabaf48deb9e4d568e87312cf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=7hdO4HV3AoFindZmGovoIg6uOPQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"繁殖与灭绝","detail":"阿根廷龙繁殖缓慢，环境变化和小行星撞击导致其灭绝。","points":null,"timestamp":270000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/72e3b602245541e2bb251a146b4b8ad0?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=jUoon6fhcLaHw23IG1SVRkvpMcI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"阿根廷龙是时代的完美答案，但时代变了，答案也会过期。","points":null,"timestamp":304000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/099f58c2d2fc44578d8aac1565302791?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=P7aRXOO35YaQzl%2FKuBHHXDUXlSs%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7613782375826263305,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"component_control":{"data_source_url":"/aweme/v1/web/mix/aweme/"},"component_info_v2":"{\"desc_lines_limit\":0,\"hide_marquee\":false}","cover_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1772721864,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":97,"enable_danmaku":true,"first_danmaku_offset":912,"is_post_denied":false,"last_danmaku_offset":309554,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"史前最大的素食恐龙之，体长35米，体重100吨一——阿根廷龙
